suite.name: TS-F02-US4

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api_session, url=http://localhost:3000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

test.name: TC10 เข้าสู่ระบบด้วยบัญชีที่สร้างไว้ใน TC01 ของ US1

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

test.doc: ทดสอบล็อกอินด้วยบัญชีที่สร้างไว้ใน TC01 ของ US1

test.name: TC11,TC12 เข้าหน้าการเดินทางที่จบแล้วและเขียนรีวิว

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.arg: xpath=//a[contains(.,'การเดินทางของฉัน')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//a[contains(.,'การเดินทางของฉัน')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//a[contains(.,'การเดินทางของฉัน')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'เขียนรีวิว')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'เขียนรีวิว')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'เขียนรีวิว')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Convert To Number
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a floating point number.

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.arg: const evt = new MouseEvent('click', { clientX: x, clientY: y, bubbles: true });
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//Button[contains(.,'ขับขี่ปลอดภัย')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//Button[contains(.,'ขับขี่ปลอดภัย')]
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//Button[contains(.,'รถสะอาดน่านั่ง')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//Button[contains(.,'รถสะอาดน่านั่ง')]
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//Button[contains(.,'คนขับอัธยาศัยดี')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//Button[contains(.,'คนขับอัธยาศัยดี')]
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//Button[contains(.,'ชอบเพลงที่เปิด')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//Button[contains(.,'ชอบเพลงที่เปิด')]
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'ส่งรีวิว')]'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: ✓ ส่งรีวิวสำเร็จแล้ว
kw.arg: ✓ ส่งรีวิวสำเร็จแล้ว
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: จำลอง Passenger เข้าหน้าเส้นทางที่จบแล้วเพื่อเขียนรีวิวให้ Driver

test.name: ลบรีวิวผ่าน API DELETE

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get User Token Via API
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '56', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "passengerreview", "password": "123456789"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
Login via API และ return access token

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.arg: msg=Token ต้องไม่เป็นค่าว่าง
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Get My Reviews Via API
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/reviews/me path_url=/api/reviews/me headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW1ha2l0YmEwMDU0Mm1iZnBlYjAyMjNhIiwicm9sZSI6IlBBU1NFTkdFUiIsImlhdCI6MTc3MjU0NTcyNCwiZXhwIjoxNzcyNTQ5MzI0fQ.a4crhb9b6DoFSeeiHOXDhX4AQabFzcS7GQZUWAewEWo'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://localhost:3000/api/reviews/me status=200, reason=OK headers={'Content-Security-Policy': "default-src 'self';base-uri 'self';font-src 'self' https: data:;form-action 'self';frame-ancestors 'self';img-src 'self' data:;object-src 'none';script-src 'self';script-src-attr 'none';style-src 'self' https: 'unsafe-inline';upgrade-insecure-requests", 'Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy': 'same-origin', 'Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy': 'same-origin', 'Origin-Agent-Cluster': '?1', 'Referrer-Policy': 'no-referrer', 'Strict-Transport-Security': 'max-age=15552000; includeSubDomains', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'X-DNS-Prefetch-Control': 'off', 'X-Download-Options': 'noopen', 'X-Frame-Options': 'SAMEORIGIN', 'X-Permitted-Cross-Domain-Policies': 'none', 'X-XSS-Protection': '0', 'Vary': 'Origin', 'Access-Control-Allow-Credentials': 'true', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '460', 'Date': 'Tue, 03 Mar 2026 13:48:44 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body=[{"id":"cmmanygpw00av1xatq8mg0xc6","bookingId":"cmmaknz2b007e2mbfx3f4nr1w","driverId":"cmmakixdo00592mbfa9z9j2al","passengerId":"cmmakitba00542mbfpeb0223a","rating":3.5,"comment":"","files":[{"url":"https://res.cloudinary.com/deqk2coqu/image/upload/v1772545722/reviews/sdoyo7if7hpzmmhgczdc.jpg","type":"IMAGE"}],"labels":["SAFE_DRIVING","CLEAN_CAR","FRIENDLY_DRIVER","GOOD_MUSIC"],"createdAt":"2026-03-03T13:48:42.405Z","updatedAt":"2026-03-03T13:48:42.405Z"}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
เรียก GET /api/reviews/me เพื่อดึงรีวิวทั้งหมดของ user ที่ login อยู่ (return list โดยตรง)

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=ไม่พบรีวิวในระบบ
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Review ID ที่จะลบ: cmmanygpw00av1xatq8mg0xc6
kw.arg: Review ID ที่จะลบ: ${review_id}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Delete Review Via API
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: DELETE On Session
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request on a previously created HTTP Session.
เรียก DELETE /api/reviews/:reviewId เพื่อลบรีวิว

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=ลบรีวิวไม่สำเร็จ (Status: ${delete_response.status_code})
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: ✓ ลบรีวิว cmmanygpw00av1xatq8mg0xc6 สำเร็จแล้วผ่าน API
kw.arg: ✓ ลบรีวิว ${review_id} สำเร็จแล้วผ่าน API
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Verify Review Button Appears After Delete
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.arg: xpath=//a[contains(.,'การเดินทางของฉัน')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//a[contains(.,'การเดินทางของฉัน')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//a[contains(.,'การเดินทางของฉัน')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//button[contains(normalize-space(.), 'ทั้งหมด')]' not visible after 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element 'xpath=//button[contains(normalize-space(.), 'ทั้งหมด')]' not visible after 10 seconds.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'เขียนรีวิว')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'เขียนรีวิว')]
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: ✓ ตรวจสอบแล้ว: ปุ่ม "เขียนรีวิว" ปรากฏขึ้นมาใหม่หลังจากลบรีวิวสำเร็จ
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
ตรวจสอบว่าหลังจากลบรีวิวแล้ว ปุ่ม "เขียนรีวิว" จะปรากฏขึ้นมาใหม่
kw.status: Element 'xpath=//button[contains(normalize-space(.), 'ทั้งหมด')]' not visible after 10 seconds.

kw.arg: Verify Review Button Appears After Delete
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Log
kw.msg: ⚠ ข้าม UI verification (อาจเกิดจาก browser session หรือ user logout)
kw.arg: ⚠ ข้าม UI verification (อาจเกิดจาก browser session หรือ user logout)
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.arg: ✓ ตรวจสอบ UI แล้ว: ปุ่ม "เขียนรีวิว" ปรากฏขึ้นมาใหม่
⚠ ข้าม UI verification (อาจเกิดจาก browser session หรือ user logout)
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: DELETE On Session
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request on a previously created HTTP Session.
เรียก DELETE /api/reviews/:reviewId เพื่อลบรีวิว

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Log
kw.msg: ไม่พบรีวิวนี้ในระบบ
kw.arg: ไม่พบรีวิวนี้ในระบบ
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.arg: ลบรีวิวสำเร็จ
ลบรีวิวสำเร็จ (No Content)
ไม่พบรีวิวนี้ในระบบ
ไม่มีสิทธิ์ลบรีวิวนี้
ไม่สามารถลบได้ (เกิน 7 วัน หรือเงื่อนไขอื่นๆ)
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.arg: Verify Review Button Appears After Delete
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

test.doc: ทดสอบการลบรีวิวด้วย review ID ที่ระบุโดยตรง (เช่น cmma9sqzx001hez3r8f49ztcc)

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.doc: US-4: ผู้ใช้เขียนรีวิวไม่ใส่ text
